records.summary: Pilot departing Rio de Janeiro saw three stationary blinking red, blue and amber lights at ~23,000 ft over Santa Cruz district on 4 Oct 2015.
Air traffic controller and FAB pilot at Ponta Pelada Airport saw a bright white zigzagging light for 12 minutes on 4 Sep 2015.
Civil servant in Ivaiporã observed two white spherical objects traveling at ~1,000 mph that appeared to merge on 31 Aug 2015.
Three aviation-knowledgeable witnesses saw a round flashing white object hovering over Manaus Air Base that slowly extinguished on 17 Aug 2015.
FAB fighter jet pilot spotted a long tubular black object at ~33,000 ft over southern Minas Gerais on 29 Jul 2015 for about one minute.
Crews of three separate airliners over Palmas all observed the same blue-green flashing light at ~34,000 ft for 20 minutes on 23 Jul 2015.
Four aircraft near Campinas reported a bright light UFO at FL120-130 detected by their TCAS systems for 20 minutes on 8 Jul 2015.
Tower operator at Manaus Air Base saw a static medium-intensity light near runway 09 that disappeared and triggered a primary radar return on 4 Jul 2015.
Pilot 129 km from Recife performed evasive maneuvers after TCAS detected a UFO 2,500 ft below making rapid lateral movements on 17 Jun 2015.
Two airline pilots over Rio de Janeiro airspace tracked a UFO on TCAS moving at ~450 km/h northeast for five minutes on 9 May 2015.
Five witnesses including a military officer saw a bright multicolored spherical UFO moving NE to SW over Brasília for one minute on 10 Apr 2015.
Pilot 55 nm from Aracaju saw a bright light cross ahead of his aircraft at impossible speed from right to left for 10 minutes on 2 Feb 2015.
Five witnesses in central Curitiba observed two metallic oval objects ~50 m each alternating proximity for 10 minutes on 15 Jan 2015.
Federal highway policeman reported an illuminated UFO rising and falling over Alagoinhas, Bahia, at 20h30 on 7 Jan 2015.
Eleven people in Guaratiba, Rio de Janeiro saw a round white-and-blue UFO making sudden rapid movements at ~3,000 ft on New Year's Day 2015.
Five oval UFOs with red, white, and blue lights observed for one hour over Cambuci neighborhood, São Paulo, by two witnesses.
Aeronautical station operator at Cascavel Aerodrome sighted a round orange UFO twice in ten minutes approaching from the east at ~180 km/h.
Three aircraft between Quixadá-CE and João Pessoa-PB reported the same large white UFO via TCAS within 50 minutes, forcing evasive maneuvers.
Brazilian Air Force R-99 aircraft near Porto Velho detected a UFO on its ACAS system and reported equipment interference for 5 minutes.
Pilot and passenger of flight PTWRG observed a circular white and red UFO for 15 minutes at 9,000 ft between Juazeiro do Norte and Fortaleza.
A witness in Guarujá observed a round white UFO hovering and swinging like a pendulum for 80 minutes; photo and video were reported but not provided.
International flight AVA 0086 detected an unidentified radar contact for 3 minutes near Manaus en route from São Paulo to Bogotá.
A flight controller at Londrina Airport visually tracked an amber-yellow light UFO for 5 minutes heading southeast with no sound or trail.
A pilot reported 3 luminous yellow spheres following his aircraft at 28,000 ft for 15 minutes on approach to Fortaleza from Manaus.
An electrical engineer in Curitiba observed a large yellowish-red spherical UFO for 30 seconds traveling west to east at estimated hypersonic speed over 10,000 km/h.
Airport employees including an aeronautical operator at Cascavel Airport sighted a large bright white circular UFO for 2 minutes at 20,000 ft heading west.
Pilot and co-pilot of TAM3773 A320 observed a large luminous oval UFO described as moon-like for 7 seconds at ~2,000 km/h near Barreiras, Bahia.
A journalist filmed three small white round UFOs at ~200 m altitude for over 7 minutes, moving randomly and grouping near Santo Antônio da Patrulha, RS.
A military observer in Foz do Iguaçu control tower tracked red and green-blue light UFO alternating acceleration and stop for 30 minutes at 25,000 ft.
A witness in Porto Alegre's Ipanema neighborhood observed a 20-metre silver elliptical UFO at only 15 m altitude passing ~20 m away, leaving a white condensation trail.
Pilot near Porto Trombetas Airport spotted a stationary amber UFO that began moving slowly as the plane approached, undetected by TCAS.
TAM pilot near Santa Maria Airport observed a jet-sized UFO with flashing red lights moving in the opposite direction, described as possibly experimental military aircraft.
Pilot on Ribeirão Preto–Porto Alegre flight spotted a large round black UFO at 32,000ft between Lages and Caxias do Sul, prompting an authorized evasive left turn.
Witness in Belo Horizonte observed three large white UFOs of indefinite form near Serra do Curral moving at great speed; sighting lasted two seconds.
Pilot and co-pilot of GLO 1949 Rio–Porto Alegre flight spotted a dark balloon-like UFO ~30m long traveling over 700km/h at 38,000ft near Foz do Iguaçu.
Witness in downtown Alegrete observed 12 orange round UFOs with luminous halos in two groups moving northeast at ~7km altitude for about two minutes.
TAM flight Belém–Brasília had TCAS detect an unknown target over Palmas, forcing an evasive maneuver; radar showed multiple targets on the ACC-AZ console.
Aircraft pilot from Boa Viagem neighborhood, Recife, watched a bright fast-moving light parallel to the beach perform a sharp high-speed right turn before disappearing over the horizon.
Two residents of Cruzeiro Novo in Brasília watched two elongated bright white UFOs hover and drift erratically toward Lago Sul for sixty minutes at cruising altitude.
Two airport ATC employees and a commercial pilot observed a slowly moving UFO with flashing blue, red, and green lights hovering ~20NM east of Londrina Airport for 8 minutes.
Total Linhas Aéreas pilot on Carauari–Coari route detected a UFO on ACAS two days in a row; it mirrored the aircraft's movements for ~7 minutes before disappearing.
About 20 witnesses on the Londrina State University campus watched a bright white UFO of variable apparent size perform rapid vertical movements for 90 minutes.
Two military operators and a meteorologist at Manaus Eduardo Gomes Airport control tower observed a large dark V-shaped UFO leaving condensation trails and traveling at high speed.
GOL 1131 pilot and co-pilot on Boa Vista–Manaus route spotted a very strong light performing high-speed maneuvers above and ahead of their aircraft at FL230–370.
Pilot and two witnesses on GLO 1201 Belém–Fortaleza flight observed a strong light larger than Venus at jet speed, flying ~10,000ft above their aircraft for one minute.
On Sep 18, 2010 a resident of Alegrete, RS filmed a round silver spinning UFO with flashing lights flying at low speed at ~3km altitude.
On Jul 16, 2010 a flight controller and 6 witnesses at Teresina Airport observed a small round silver-red UFO zigzagging rapidly at ~5,000ft for 20 minutes.
On Jul 12, 2010 an F5M fighter pilot detected a supersonic UFO at Mach 1.6 and FL380 on radar near Anápolis Air Base, confirmed by a second aircraft.
On Jul 19, 2009 two star-like blue-red UFOs were observed zigzagging for 90 minutes near Lagoa do Carcará in Nísia Floresta, RN, coinciding with a local power failure.
On Apr 18, 2009 a TAM airline pilot flying from Curitiba to São Paulo observed a metallic triangular UFO just 20 meters above his aircraft at 37,000ft.
On Dec 18, 2008 a flight attendant in Florianópolis, SC saw a round white high-speed UFO execute a 360° turn and vanish, leaving abnormal light trails.
On Oct 17, 2008 two air traffic controllers and a GOL airline pilot independently observed a red spherical UFO at high speed near Santarém Airport, PA.
On Sep 27, 2008 the TAM8002 pilot over Una, BA reported a UFO moving far faster than his aircraft at 10,000ft above his altitude before disappearing on the horizon.
On Jul 28, 2008 farm residents near Camapuã, MS witnessed a round lit UFO land and take off 1km away, causing panic and loss of phone/cell communications for 25 minutes.
On Dec 23, 2007 a Manaus resident reported a slow gelatinous jelly-like luminous UFO emitting two bright flashes and making a slight lateral movement in a partly cloudy sky.
On Oct 1, 2007 a luminous UFO followed TAM8077 from Manaus to Belém at FL390, registering on TCAS and forcing an evasive maneuver; a second airliner also reported it.
On Sep 24, 2007 a Manaus resident observed a stationary white flashing UFO that emitted synchronous light pulses for ~50 seconds before vanishing instantaneously.
On May 11, 2007 the crew of VARIG2343 approaching Aracaju, SE reported an intense light UFO flying nearly opposite their direction at FL340, visible for 10–15 seconds.
On May 9, 2007 pilots of two TAM flights near Uberlândia, MG independently reported a stationary strong yellow light at ~35,000ft with no radar contact from CINDACTA.
On Apr 18, 2007 a nearly stationary round silver UFO was observed for 15 minutes between Itajubá and São Lourenço, MG with no electrical interference or noise reported.
Four opalescent oval UFOs zig-zagged at low altitude over Curitiba's Bairro Alto neighborhood for one hour on 11 Mar 2007.
Two large disc-shaped UFOs emitting red, green, and white lights were seen over Copacabana, Rio de Janeiro, on 20 Feb 2007.
A FAB A-29 pilot on a night transfer flight saw a white light UFO traveling in the opposite direction near Florianópolis on 18 Dec 2006; no radar detection.
A VARIG 9511 pilot near Recife detected a luminous UFO via TCAS on 12 Nov 2006; ground radar showed nothing and aircraft equipment was checked.
Pilot of TAM8004 en route to Buenos Aires saw flashing UFOs approaching and receding near Bagé, RS, at 36,000 ft on 3 Oct 2006; no radar contact.
A flickering light followed VARIG2348 for 12 minutes during descent near Natal on 28 May 2006; radar showed no traffic in the sector.
A Botafogo resident observed three light-orange oval UFOs stationary at ~2,000 m over Rio de Janeiro with binoculars on 1 Apr 2005 and recorded video.
Two round bright UFOs were seen over Cachoeirinha on 26 Jan 2005; a smaller grayish object orbited the larger one in circular motion.
Pilot of VRG8638 reported three white stationary lights above FL360 southwest of Curitiba flashing every 10 seconds for five minutes on 17 Jan 2005.
A car-sized yellow fireball was seen by a witness and fishermen falling into the sea near Ilha do Campeche, Florianópolis, on 18 May 2004.
Five air traffic controllers at Manaus Airport watched a helicopter-sized white/red UFO for 20 minutes on 25 Apr 2004, coinciding with a power failure at the facility.
Two giant spherical UFOs, each the size of four Boeing 747s, were observed for one hour by control tower staff and a TAM pilot near Goiânia on 1 Apr 2004.
Four air traffic controllers and a TAM pilot near Goiânia observed two immense stationary UFOs on 1 Mar 2004, one ~2NM and another ~10NM wide, detected on Anápolis radar.
Crew of Varig Log VLO9063 tracked a red-and-white light flying parallel for 30 min near Curitiba on 7 Aug 2003; full ATC transcript included, no radar returns.
A Guarapuava resident photographed a small yellowish-white UFO leaving a condensation trail at high speed near the horizon at sunrise on 27 Jul 2003.
Several witnesses saw a round, glowing UFO moving like a windshield wiper over Senador Firmino for 15 minutes on 23 May 2003.
Fire Department captain reported multiple public calls about unidentified airborne objects over Belo Horizonte to COMDABRA on 26 April 2003.
Five witnesses at Viracopos Airport saw a reddish circular UFO claimed to be 20x the size of a Boeing 747 flying at low altitude at high speed on 26 April 2003.
Single witness in Curitiba's Portão district saw a bright blue star-shaped UFO hovering then flying northeast for 40 seconds on 27 Feb 2003.
A family of three in São José dos Pinhais observed six round white UFOs about 5m in diameter flying south to north at 2,000m altitude on 3 Feb 2003.
Four family members in Novo Hamburgo observed four silver star-like UFOs performing erratic, coordinated maneuvers at 10,000–15,000m altitude on 26 Dec 2002.
Two witnesses using binoculars observed a balloon-shaped, star-bright stationary UFO hovering over Sobradinho, DF for 90 minutes on 19 Dec 2002.
An Army Reserve officer in Porto Alegre's Navegantes neighborhood spotted seven small white dot-shaped UFOs just 600m away traveling at 100km/h on 16 Dec 2002.
A witness in Curitiba observed two large silver-white globe UFOs with halos hovering stationary then moving in slow circular patterns for 45 minutes on 1 Sept 2002.
Two witnesses in Parobé observed a large ~40m rectangular UFO flying slowly at low altitude with no trails for 10 minutes on 1 Sept 2002.
A university professor in Curitiba's Batel district saw a red star-shaped UFO moving in circles at 5,000ft altitude heading west for 25 seconds on 8 Aug 2002.
A witness in Curitiba's Alto da XV district watched three bright blue star-shaped UFOs hover stationary to the south of the city center for 20 minutes on 16 June 2002.
An airline pilot near Foz do Iguaçu airport observed a static round gray UFO at 8,000ft that then ascended vertically until it disappeared on 1 April 2002.
A witness in Goiânia was left in shock after a dark opaque triangular UFO (~10x30m) hovered just 60m above him making sudden movements on 12 March 2002.
A witness in Porto Alegre's Rio Branco district observed six rectangular yellow UFOs traveling south to north at high speed at ~12,000ft on 18 Feb 2002.
Ten witnesses in Gama Sul, Brasília observed a stationary red star-like UFO that made zigzag movements; photos reportedly taken but not filed.
A single witness in Cuiabá photographed a 50-metre white oval UFO hovering at 2 km altitude and reaching ~200 km/h; cloudy conditions.
A red orb was observed for 20 minutes over Curitiba by an aviation school member, alternating slow movement with stops at ~5,000 ft altitude.
About 150 people in Estirão do Equador, Amazonas saw a round green UFO emitting a continuous whistle, moving faster than a commercial airliner at 24,000 ft.
Two witnesses in Goiânia saw a fast blue star-like UFO the size of two stars moving west at ~30 km altitude for 2 minutes; shape undefined.
Five witnesses near Curitiba observed a black cigar-shaped UFO about 8 metres long flying slowly northeast at 1,000 metres altitude; photos reportedly taken.
Two airline pilots and an air traffic controller at São Luís airport independently observed a rocket-like UFO leaving white trails at ~60,000 ft heading north-northeast.
Near the São Gonçalo Canal in Pelotas, a witness observed a green hang-glider-shaped UFO the size of a football field moving vertically at high speed and 700 m altitude.
Two witnesses in Leblon, Rio de Janeiro saw multiple white dot UFOs for 40 minutes leaving large red luminous trails heading south toward Jacarepaguá.
A witness in Vila Nova, Goiânia observed a large round orange UFO the size of two Boeing 737s hovering in the eastern sector for 40 seconds; video taken but not filed.
Two witnesses in Curitiba's Cabral district observed a yellow-red star-like UFO spinning on its own axis and flying northeast for 15 minutes.
Two witnesses in Curitiba's Champagnhagt neighborhood saw a red comet-like UFO leaving long reddish fire trails moving west to southeast for 30 seconds.
Four witnesses in Bairro Alto, Curitiba saw a very bright stationary round UFO described as 500 times larger than a star, at sub-satellite altitude, for 20 seconds.
A witness in Dourados, Mato Grosso do Sul observed a shape-shifting UFO that began oval and emitted white light while hovering at ~30,000 ft for 13 minutes; video not filed.
Four witnesses in Brasília saw two multicolor bright lights hovering over the southeastern sector, about 2 km apart, for 35 seconds under good visibility.
On 23 Mar 2001, military at Anápolis airbase tracked a brilliant stationary object on radar; a Mirage fighter was scrambled but the UFO vanished on approach.
On 23 Mar 2001, a crowd in Paracatu watched a round shiny white UFO hover stationary at low altitude for two hours in clear skies.
On 23 Mar 2001, multiple witnesses in Catalão observed a round silver UFO with varying brightness hovering near Ipameri for about 90 minutes.
On 11 Mar 2001, a witness in the Guabirotuba neighbourhood of Curitiba saw a round gray-and-red UFO hovering at ~45 m altitude for 15 minutes.
On 8 Mar 2001, two witnesses in Sobradinho-DF observed a bright blue-and-red UFO moving slowly from north to south with no noise or interference.
On 8 Mar 2001, two residents of Lago Sul saw a white spherical UFO flying slowly over the Esplanada dos Ministérios and Supreme Court in Brasília.
On 5 Mar 2001, a TAM airline pilot at Canoas Airport observed a Boeing-737-sized white cylindrical UFO performing pendulum-like motion at 2,000 ft for 30 seconds.
On 4 Mar 2001, a witness in Goiânia's Celina Parque district observed a large white ball-shaped UFO traveling north-to-south at high altitude for over 2.5 hours.
On 10 Feb 2001, two Lago Sul residents in Brasília saw dozens of golden triangular UFOs at 12,000 ft making zigzag movements and vanishing suddenly.
On 26 Jan 2001, two witnesses in Curitiba's Capão do Imbuia district reported a reddish-white point of light moving at high speed at ~200 ft altitude for 10 minutes.
On 17 Jan 2001, a witness in Guará I, Brasília-DF, observed a large balloon-shaped multicolored UFO that hovered stationary over two consecutive nights.
On 7 Jan 2001, two witnesses in Iguarapava-SP observed a round orange UFO larger than an airplane traveling north to southwest for 5-10 minutes.
On 3 Jan 2001, four witnesses near Montes Claros Airport saw several red star-like UFOs descend vertically toward the runway then speed away.
On 12 Dec 2001, two witnesses in Bairro Alto, Curitiba, spotted a stationary horizontal yellow line-shaped UFO slightly larger than a star for 20 minutes.
In Nov 2000, an Igarapava-SP witness reported eight years of UFO sightings and claimed close encounters, describing cigar- and spoon-shaped objects, with photos and film.
Six witnesses in Porecatu filmed a stationary shiny silver transparent bubble for ~4 hours; confirmed by COMDABRA as a UNESP meteorological balloon.
Two military witnesses at Santa Cruz Air Base saw a white point of light UFO moving slowly at 1,500m altitude for 15 minutes; not the first such incident there.
Six witnesses in Juvevê, Curitiba observed two yellowish-white luminous dot UFOs zigzagging below building height and reported it to COMDABRA during the sighting.
The same Curitiba family called COMDABRA a second time in one night to report two yellowish-white zigzagging UFOs, one now emitting sparks, flying below buildings.
Three witnesses in downtown Curitiba observed two round silver shiny UFOs flying fast at 10km altitude heading south, leaving no trails or noise.
Three witnesses in downtown Londrina spotted five round blinking red UFOs moving in circles at very high altitude, traveling east to west over just 3 seconds.
A single witness in Champagnat, Curitiba observed two small white cylindrical UFOs separated by 4,000ft moving slowly east to west at ~10,000ft altitude.
Two witnesses in Santa Cândida, Curitiba saw a white triangular UFO zigzagging at high altitude heading south for 30 seconds while observing the Moon.
One witness in central Curitiba reported a white cigar-shaped UFO flying slowly north to south at 1km altitude for 5 minutes, silent and leaving no trails.
A doctor near Caiobá observed a massive red crab-like UFO with claw appendages hovering at 300m then accelerating at very high speed toward the coast.
Two witnesses at the Polo de Cinema in Sobradinho, DF observed two round metallic shiny UFOs flying slowly north at very high altitude for 10 minutes.
Three witnesses in Colombo, PR observed an orange crescent moon-shaped UFO hovering near the horizon for 7 minutes, its light fading as if obscured by smoke.
A witness in Bairro Alto, Curitiba observed an estimated 15-meter white and yellow flying-saucer-shaped UFO at 5–8km altitude moving west to east for 20 minutes.
Six witnesses in Florianópolis saw six yellow-white ellipsoid/cigar UFOs at ~9,000m; two discoid objects traced an S-path, then four more appeared in V-formation around a larger cigar craft.
A single witness in São José dos Pinhais saw a round orange UFO hover for 20 minutes then accelerate rapidly eastward toward Serra do Mar.
A NES airline pilot and co-witness near Petrolina saw a white traffic-light-like UFO at 18,000ft that vanished after ~1 minute with no other radar traffic.
Two witnesses in Rebouças, Curitiba saw a star-like orange dot UFO alternating movement and stops for 15 minutes before it drifted west into clouds.
Two witnesses in Passo da Areia, Porto Alegre observed two stationary yellow dot-like UFOs at high altitude for 20 minutes with no condensation trails.
Several neighbors in the Xaxim neighborhood, Curitiba watched a stationary round orange UFO hover for one hour under a partly cloudy sky.
A corroborating sighting of the same round orange UFO was reported from Pilarzinho, Curitiba on the same night it was seen in the Xaxim neighborhood.
A long-time contactee in Foz do Iguaçu reported a mothership plus thousands of square objects following a Varig aircraft, and claimed ETs delivered a message about dominating Earth.
A witness in Brasília's industrial sector reported a white star-like UFO the size of half a car hovering at ~1,000m altitude for up to 40 minutes in Dec 1999.
Two binocular-equipped witnesses in Bela Vista, SP observed a large round white UFO with red and green edges that showed a partial triangular form, lasting 20 minutes.
Two witnesses in São Paulo watched a large round white ball-like UFO ringed with red and green lights hovering mostly stationary for 40 minutes in Dec 1999.
A housewife in Ceilândia Norte, DF had a close encounter at ~200m with a round UFO bearing multicolored lights that circled her house before heading north.
Three witnesses in Pelotas used binoculars to observe a football-stadium-sized white/yellow UFO hovering for 40 minutes at 4,000m that ejected smaller lights toward the ground.
A witness in Cabo de Santo Agostinho, PE saw a very large shiny metallic round object resembling a new moon flying at jet speed toward the ocean in Oct 1999.
Three people in Medianeiras, PR spotted a gray UFO of indefinite shape at 35,000ft that left a trail of golden smoke and moved west during a 25-minute sighting.
Three witnesses in Batel, Curitiba saw a 4m gray-to-fluorescent-green cigar-shaped UFO at 50m altitude that vibrated perceptibly before accelerating south in 4 seconds.
An F-100 fighter pilot 20NM from Araraquara observed three triangular UFOs flying in line at extreme speed; their passage triggered aircraft alarms and left a fiery trail.

records.location: en route Fortaleza to São Paulo (near Santa Cruz Air Base)
records.summary: TAM 809 crew spotted 3 triangular UFOs at ~70,000ft in diamond formation traveling faster than the airliner at 35,000ft on Sept 25, 1999.
Two witnesses in Brasília observed two large round fluorescent UFOs making circles above the TV Tower on Aug 26, 1999.
Three witnesses near SQN 208-209 in Brasília observed a large round white UFO moving in circles and heading north to south on Aug 26, 1999.
Four people in Champagnat, Curitiba spotted a round orange UFO moving fast from north to south leaving light condensation trails on Aug 1, 1999.

records.location: Porto Nacional / Minaçu (en route Palmas to Brasília)
records.summary: A pilot and co-pilot on a Palmas-Brasília flight observed a small multicolored round UFO pacing their aircraft at 18,000ft for 3 minutes on July 29, 1999.
Five witnesses in Campo Mourão observed a stationary orange-yellow star-like UFO hovering in the west approximately 40km away on July 7, 1999.
Four family members near Ribeirão Preto Airport watched a yellow light UFO spin 360°, hover, blink and disappear over 15 minutes on July 13, 1999.
Seven TAM 825 crew members observed an intense pulsating white light UFO at 35,000ft following their aircraft for over an hour on June 15, 1999.
A man in Getulina-SP reported a 30-minute close encounter with a 3-meter round white UFO hovering just 10m away with mechanical arms; burnt vegetation found next day.
Two family members in Brasília's Asa Norte district observed a large spinning oval white UFO appearing bigger than the Moon for 30 seconds on May 29, 1999.
Two witnesses in Caruaru-PE spotted a large red-and-yellow cigar-shaped UFO flying uniformly northward at low speed before disappearing behind clouds on May 25, 1999.
Four people in Assis Chateaubriand-PR watched an intermittent red star-like UFO move from south to north for 1.5 hours on April 21, 1999.
A Ribeirão Preto resident observed a multicolored (orange, red, blue) round stationary UFO appearing moon-sized for 40 minutes on April 5, 1999.
Two witnesses in Sobradinho I, DF observed two stationary red and silver round UFOs hovering for 3 minutes on March 19, 1999.
Two people near Clube Santa Mônica in Colombo-PR spotted a fast-moving oval silver UFO at low altitude making circular movements heading east to west on March 18, 1999.
Three witnesses observed a slow-moving round yellow UFO over Sobradinho-DF; the reporter stated she had seen it four times in the prior 30 days.
Single witness in Colina Verde, Londrina-PR spotted an airplane-sized yellow-light UFO flying west for about 10 seconds with no condensation trail.
Two witnesses in Vila Ipiranga, Porto Alegre-RS observed a small multicolor star-shaped UFO alternating green, red, and blue colors while maneuvering erratically.
Two people in Rio Doce, Olinda-PE watched two large multicolored prism-like UFOs fly slowly eastward for 10 minutes on a clear night.
About 40 witnesses in Armazém-SC saw a small round yellow UFO flying slowly at high altitude; one hour later two aircraft appeared to chase it, and it emitted a ground-directed light beam.
Four witnesses in Irati-PR observed three white star-like UFOs at ~10,000m altitude flying at high speed and repeatedly changing direction without leaving contrails.
Three people in Curitiba-PR watched a stationary white star-like UFO hovering near the horizon for about two minutes before it departed.
Seven witnesses in Samambaia, Brasília-DF observed four red-orange light-point UFOs zigzagging and leaving light trails for 7 minutes; a video was recorded but not released.
Two witnesses between Luziânia and Ipameri-GO saw an airplane-sized multicolor (red, blue, green) UFO zigzagging southwest at ~10km altitude and ~500km/h.
Three people in Santa Cândida, Curitiba-PR had a close encounter with two golf-ball-sized red orbs only ~1m away; the objects emitted a low hum, left dark trails, and reached the ground.
Six witnesses in Boqueirão, Curitiba-PR observed four round UFOs (three white, one red) performing slow circular movements for 30 minutes before departing like shooting stars.
Five witnesses in Medianeira district, Santa Maria-RS had a close encounter with two golf-ball-sized multicolor orbs that approached to within 60 metres before heading south.
Three witnesses near Pilõezinhos-PB watched a white cylindrical UFO fly at high speed only 20m away; community rumors of abduction attempts circulated in nearby areas.
Four people in Santo Antônio de Lisboa-SC were followed by eight white spheres in circular formation for one hour; witnesses photographed the objects but photos were not released.
A single witness in Xaxim neighbourhood, Curitiba-PR spotted a gray elongated cigar-shaped UFO heading north on a clear night; no speed or altitude could be estimated.
Ten witnesses in Curitiba's Fazendinha neighborhood spotted 15 round red/orange UFOs zigzagging at 10,000ft during rain before heading South.
Three witnesses in Boa Viagem, Recife observed a multicolored conical necklace-shaped UFO hovering stationary and spinning for 30 seconds at 2,500m.
A pilot and 14 passengers on a flight near Varginha/São Tomé das Letras observed a round flat discoidal UFO 30NM away below 2,000ft for one hour.
Two witnesses in Água Verde, Curitiba observed a silver and red ping-pong ball-shaped UFO hovering stationary at ~10,000m making circular movements for 15 minutes.
Six people on BR-040 near Brasília were chased for 2 hours by 3 gray triangular UFOs emitting green/red lights that matched the car's speed and stopped when the car stopped.
One witness in Park Way, Brasília spotted a round white UFO flying fast from South to North at airplane altitude under clear skies for 10 minutes.
Five witnesses in Goiânia saw 3 large blue luminous round UFOs performing circular and triangular maneuvers with a loud whistle; confirmed by Anápolis radar.
Two witnesses 4km from Brasília observed a Boeing 737-sized round blue UFO flying slowly at ~1,000m altitude, leaving a visible trail of light behind it for 15 minutes.
A resident of Interlagos, São Paulo photographed two small white oval stationary UFOs that left condensation trails when they moved; photos not made available.
Two witnesses in Brasília's Asa Norte observed a round white UFO stationary near Orion's Belt for 60 minutes; the object changed color tonality during the sighting.
An aircraft pilot in Brasília observed two multicolored star-like UFOs with binoculars for 45 minutes; one moved at high speed toward the Northwest.
Four witnesses in Água Verde, Curitiba observed a white dot UFO practically stationary before slowly moving West; sighting was ongoing when reported to COMDABRA.
Seven witnesses in Tarumã, Curitiba watched a Boeing 737-sized round UFO with lateral lumps zigzag for 1 hour, twice forming a bright triangular light pattern.
Three witnesses in Água Verde, Curitiba observed a round red star-like UFO moving slowly at very high altitude on a North/South trajectory for 15 minutes.
Six witnesses in Brasília observed a blinding shiny round airplane-sized UFO hovering mostly stationary at 500m altitude before slowly moving North for 5 minutes.
Four witnesses in Curitiba observed a round orange shape-shifting UFO for 50 minutes on Jan 13, 1998; COMDABRA documented the report.
Anonymous witness reported a large blue UFO crashing near Diamantino-MT on BR-364 around Nov 1997; reported to COMDABRA in Jan 1998.
Two witnesses in Cabral neighborhood, Curitiba observed a large ball-with-tail UFO sliding at speed for 20 minutes on Jan 13, 1998.
A witness in Bairro Batel, Curitiba used binoculars to observe a stationary white-and-red dot UFO hovering for ~3 min 40 sec on Dec 26, 1997.
Five people near Bacacheri Airport, Curitiba watched several bright white dot UFOs with light trails maneuvering for 2 hours on Dec 26, 1997.
Two witnesses in Champagnat, Curitiba observed an oval blue-and-yellow UFO floating at ~70 m altitude for 50 seconds on Dec 12, 1997.
A pilot and two others in Cruz Alta-RS reported a round red-green UFO with white trail moving vertically from 3,500 ft on Sep 22, 1997.
Six witnesses in Pinheirinho, Curitiba observed two silver ball UFOs flying at triple aircraft speed and one briefly following a plane on Aug 29, 1997.
One witness in Pinheirinho, Curitiba observed four bright blue-white oval UFOs moving slowly in a straight path at high altitude on Aug 27, 1997.
A rancher near Blumenau-SC reported three sightings over 15 days of two round silver UFOs on parallel descending paths; last sighting filmed on Aug 25, 1997.
Five witnesses in Lago Norte, Brasília observed a large star-like UFO emitting red-yellow light maneuvering just above buildings for over 30 min on Aug 19, 1997.
Military on duty at CPBV Air Base, Serra do Cachimbo-PA reported three UFO sightings Jul 10-16, 1997; oval craft with rotating lights directed beam at guard post.
Several farmworkers near Ilhéus-BA witnessed a bright 3-metre UFO hovering over a cocoa dryer at 10 m altitude and departing at high speed on Aug 8, 1997.
VARIG 343 crew reported a large blue comet-shaped UFO passing at high speed near Salvador-BA at FL090 on Aug 8, 1997, shortly after takeoff.
Academic study by UnB Ufological Studies Group analyzed the Apr 11, 1991 UFO sighting at Papuda Prison, Brasília, observed by 20+ police officers for over 3 hours.
Airport personnel at Ponta Grossa observed a color-changing star-like UFO at 2,000ft for 10-15 minutes on May 6, 1997, marking the second such sighting there.
A witness in Curitiba observed a large round red-orange UFO appearing bigger than the moon for two weeks nightly around 8:00 pm starting May 5, 1997.
Retired Army colonel reported a 1997 Curitiba sighting of a luminous horizontal-line UFO, and recalled a 1967-68 mass sighting at AMAN where a watchman fell into a coma.
Four witnesses in Paranaguá observed a Boeing-sized UFO with smaller objects circling it for over 30 minutes at low altitude on April 4, 1997.
Six people in Curitiba sighted an elongated red-and-white UFO '3 to 4 blocks' long flying at high speed and altitude on April 5, 1997; one witness filmed it.
A commercial pilot and two passengers aboard PTVOY observed three large circular orange-white-yellow flashing UFOs pacing their aircraft near Corumbá for 35 minutes on April 7, 1997.
Nine witnesses in Belo Horizonte's Delfim Moreira neighborhood spotted two white bird-shaped UFOs performing circular movements at 500m altitude for 30 minutes on March 28, 1997.

On Mar 28, 1984, the head of APP/TWR Vitória observed a slightly flattened, oval, all-green luminous object with a tail moving south-to-north at remarkable speed at 1,500–2,000m altitude; no radar contact from Brasília.

On Dec 27, 1983, a Campinas Airport tower operator received multiple public calls about a UFO ~13 NM north-northeast; radar video was recorded and small plots appeared briefly before contact was lost.

Between Apr 28 and May 16, 1982, repeated radar detections of multiple unidentified objects at Anápolis Air Base prompted FAB interceptors to scramble on several nights; one object turned off its lights on approach.
On Jun 17, 1982, two FAB pilots and crew flying over Uberlândia at FL370 observed a luminous sphere that split into six bright fragments; three other aircraft in the area confirmed the sighting.
On Mar 23, 1982, military personnel at Anápolis Air Base observed a circular white-to-silver (sometimes reddish) UFO over the aerodrome; an FAB alert aircraft searched to FL500 without success.
On Mar 6, 1982, military police in four São Paulo cities — Presidente Prudente, Regente Feijó, Rancharia, and Marília — observed fast-moving, silent UFOs emitting light beams over the state.
Four separate UFO events between April and November 1982 were logged by CINDACTA controllers across Brazil, including radar tracks over Campinas, Brasília, and Goiás with variable speed and altitude.
VASP flight VP169 and Transbrasil QD177 observed an intense, color-changing light near Belo Horizonte on three consecutive days in February 1982, confirmed on radar.
Control tower operator at Florianópolis airport observed a high-intensity silvery-yellow light hovering for 7 minutes before disappearing behind Cambirela hill on Dec 16, 1981.
Brazilian Navy corvette Mearim crew visually observed three yellowish UFOs resting on the Amazon River surface near Parintins-AM; objects evaded radar on May 5, 1980.
FAB C-115 aircraft performed evasive maneuver to avoid collision with an intense unidentified light near São João de Meriti-RJ on Aug 26, 1980; four military crew witnessed it.
Multiple UFOs observed visually and on radar by control tower operators and VASP pilots over Goiânia-GO on Feb 19, 1980; two F-103 fighters placed on alert.
Photographs taken near the Paraguay River in Dec 1980 revealed three stationary UFOs; a second witness later observed three craft flying in formation over indigenous Maku territory.
Civilian letter to the Ministry of Aeronautics described a blue-green light over Ceres-GO on Feb 26, 1979, which appeared to respond to the witness's hand gestures in the vertical axis.
A Super-8 film of an unidentified hovering object filmed at 2:30 am on Dec 30, 1978 in Tatuapé-SP was delivered to authorities for research.
A postal worker in Guará I-DF observed a silent silver oval UFO on Nov 21, 1979 flying on a trajectory from Guará I toward Brasília airport over 15 seconds.
Two aircraft on the Sao Paulo–Brasilia route (Transbrasil QD-460 and PT-KPB) reported the same UFO near Paracatu-Cristalina in Aug 1978; radar tracked it at speeds between 133 and 804 kt.
Pilot of PT-JKQ on the BH–Curitiba route and a Curitiba control tower operator independently reported a varying-intensity luminous UFO on Sep 8, 1978.
Military personnel at the DPV flight-protection station Sítio do Gama-DF reported a cigar-shaped luminous UFO with multicolored lights on Jun 20, 1978, accompanied by stone-throwing and panic.
An MP sergeant near Itirapina-SP reported 6 groups of illuminated objects near Broá dam, including some in apparent landing operations, on Oct 18, 1978.
Three aircraft (SBD, SBA, SBJ) and Bauru tower reported a pulsating luminous UFO near Campinas, Bauru and São Paulo on Dec 6, 1978; object exhibited near-instant acceleration and deceleration.
Operation Saucer (Operação Prato) reports 001–010 document ten civilian UFO encounters in Para state in Sep–Oct 1977, including paralysis from a light beam and directed blue-light emissions.
Operação Prato reports 011–020: military team logged 10 luminous-body sightings in Oct–Nov 1977 over Pará; report 017 includes a humanoid emerging from a hatch.
Operação Prato reports 021–030: ten UFO sightings in Nov 1977 in Pará; report 024 records electrostatic/magnetic effects measured by theodolite; report 021/022 note apparent water landings.
Operação Prato reports 031–040: ten luminous-body sightings in Nov 1977 in Pará; objects mostly undefined shape making supersonic passes near Colares Island and Mosqueiro.
Operação Prato reports 041–050: ten sightings Nov 1977 in Pará; report 042 records oval metallic object seen from a Cessna 206; report 050 notes UFO directing a blue beam in multiple directions.

records.location: Colares / Mosqueiro / Canal do Navio, Pará
records.summary: Operação Prato reports 051–060: ten luminous-body sightings Nov–Dec 1977 in Pará; multiple observers including military team ICOMAR tracked objects making supersonic maneuvers over Colares.
Operação Prato reports 061–070: ten luminous-body sightings Dec 1977 in Pará; report 064 records object projecting intense blue light beams toward Colares Island; photographed by military team.

records.location: Mosqueiro / Ananindeua / São Domingos do Capim, Pará
records.summary: Operação Prato reports 071–080: ten luminous-body sightings Dec 1977 in Pará; report 076 describes close circular object at 100 m distance photographed 26 times rotating and undulating near São Domingos do Capim.

Operação Prato reports 081–090: ten sightings Dec 1977–Feb 1978 in Pará; report 083 describes a hat-shaped craft landed on ground for 10 min; report 087 shows object with circular body hovering over beach directing blue beam.
Operação Prato reports 091–100: ten luminous-body sightings Feb–Mar 1978 in Pará around Colares, recorded by military ICOMAR team with supersonic maneuvers and color-changing blue flashes.

Operação Prato reports 101–110: ten sightings Mar–Jul 1978 in Pará; report 103 shows object projecting three intense blue light sources over the sea; reports 105/106 describe circular craft over Benevides.

Operação Prato reports 111–120: ten luminous-body sightings Jul 1978 over Benevides, PA; multiple supersonic passes and blue flashes at altitudes up to 11,000 m observed by military and civilian witnesses.

Operação Prato reports 121–130: ten sightings Jul–Nov 1978 in Pará; report 123 shows UFO directing spotlight on witness causing temporary vision loss; reports 129/130 are aerial observations by pilots.
On 29 Nov 1979 two commercial airline pilots (QD-555 and VP-377) independently corroborated a color-changing UFO performing acrobatic maneuvers at altitude near Governador Valadares, MG.

On 3 Jul 1978 an 11-year-old boy in Penha, São Paulo witnessed a 10-m diameter metallic disc hovering 2 m above ground; a beam of light temporarily immobilized his dog and caused static electricity in his hair and clothes.
On 8 Nov 1978 near Montes Claros, MG, a Bandeirante aircraft suffered sequential engine failures and total electrical blackout as a strange object flew close to the aircraft.
FAB pilot reported a stationary strong light at ~45 NM from Recife VOR at FL 060/070; other aircraft sent to investigate found nothing.
Recife airport tower operators and a Transbrasil Boeing 727 crew spotted a luminous object that disappeared without trace when the aircraft approached.
Multiple TAM pilots and ATC controllers tracked a luminous object between Campinas and Bauru for 25 minutes; it followed aircraft and showed rapid acceleration/deceleration.
FAB C-95 crew and Vitória ATC with binoculars observed a 'mother ship' surrounded by smaller craft 20 NM from Vitória at 20,000 ft on Dec 16 1977.
Multiple witnesses in Pelotas on Sep 16 1976 saw six small round red-lit UFOs flying in formation 15 m above ground toward Lagoa dos Patos, emitting a slight hiss.
A tractor driver at Fazenda Triângulo Azul reported three strange beings appearing out of fog and circling his tractor, described as 'saints in light blue dresses'.
UFO research group investigated Capão do Leão farm near Pelotas on Jun 28 1975 and observed shifting red/orange light projections and witnessed lights apparently respond to radio commands.
A 66-year-old woman in Pelotas encountered a humanoid alien inside her home on Oct 7 1973; the being demonstrated a descending basket from an invisible craft.
Cow udder and lamb blood were surgically removed at a Santa Vitória do Palmar farm in Jul 1975 with no bleeding; luminous objects were seen in the same area at night.
Multiple witnesses in Belo Horizonte on Apr 7 1974 observed a huge shape-shifting dark cloud-like object that at times assumed a clear disc/saucer shape, moving erratically for 3-5 minutes.
Three quarry workers in Votorantim gave police statements on May 28 1974 about a circular craft with green, red and yellow lights hovering 100 m overhead that emitted a turbine sound.
Multiple witnesses including teachers on the Ubirajara-Galia road in SP reported recurrent orange-red ball of light Aug–Nov 1972; it emitted a spotlight beam and seemed to follow vehicles.
On Dec 14 1972, ATC controllers and a commercial pilot tracked a rounded metallic UFO near Pirassununga-SP at ~40,000 ft; the pilot photographed it and it moved away when approached.
A retired Brazilian general and family observed a large disc-shaped craft with four dark engine disks and blue domes descend over their bus on highway BR-116 near Realeza-MG on Jul 26 1972.
On Jul 27 1972, pilots, ATC controllers, and hundreds of civilians in Belo Horizonte reported a squadron of luminous objects moving at low altitude with a filament trail in formation.
Ovoid luminous object remained stationary for hours over Recife then vanished, witnessed by credible attendees at the America Club.
Multiple witnesses including high-ranking military observed hat-shaped fog craft with occupants, music, perfume, and beam effects at Fazenda Vale do Rio do Ouro.
Fireball-like flying saucers appeared repeatedly over Pereiro-CE after seismic shocks, emitting intense jets of light over houses and witnessed by the local mayor.
2-meter-tall beings in green diving suits emerged from a mushroom-shaped disc on a soccer field in Belo Horizonte; ground depression and carbonized material found.
Convair-340 crew on the São Paulo–Londrina route observed a luminous object pacing and crossing the aircraft's bow, confirmed by Londrina airport control tower.
Witness observed a ~14-metre brown flying saucer with a dome and round windows hovering and slowly spinning over Morro do Passarinho before departing toward Cunha-SP.
Oval silver object circled Varginha at 19:00, hovered near a residence causing a woman to faint from noise, emitted light beams, then flew toward the Army's ESA in Três Corações.
Five female students driving near Agudos-SP observed a shape-shifting biconvex light that followed their car, changing from sphere to rectangle along the Marechal Rondon highway.
SIOANI bulletin compiling 70 UFO cases from 1968–1969 with summaries and sketches, covering diverse shapes, multiple landings, occupant contacts, and paralysis effects.
VARIG cargo-plane crew (Porto Alegre–Rio de Janeiro) tracked a bright yellow light pacing the aircraft from Guaratuba to Paranaguá, varying speed and altitude before disappearing.
Illuminated spinning disc with visible occupant silhouettes hovered 2m above Itaipu beach, Niterói; photographed over Morro Vintém where two radio technicians had previously died with lead masks.
Video (1995) with researcher Fernando Cleto explaining the 1952 Barra da Tijuca case, in which a press photographer captured a disc over Rio de Janeiro.
The Barra da Tijuca Case: original 1952 press photographs of a disc-shaped UFO over Barra da Tijuca, Rio de Janeiro — one of Brazil's most famous early sightings.
